tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
         Girls just wanna have fun[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
So they party, so they party[/tab]

(Ayy, yo, Nashi, you goin' crazy)


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Lil' mama a party girl, she just wan' have fun too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you ain't wifey type, but I don't care, I want you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
She like to do drugs too, she in love with guns too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you too piped up, but I think that I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Lil' mama a party girl, she just wan' have fun too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                N.C.
They say you ain't wifey type, but I don't care, I want you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
She like to do drugs too, she in love with guns too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you too piped up, but I think that I love you[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]
She don't want nobody, she don't need somebody[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm tryna be with you so you don't be without me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
She totin' just like me, no, we can't leave without it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
She boot up off the meds like she can't breathe without it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
She drinkin' Four Lokos, I can't get with those[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
She wan' give me toto, I tell her come close[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]
She say, "You say you love me, but I don't know what love means"[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I ask her who got her heart, 'cause damn, that nigga lucky[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]
I been tryna reach for it, but it's too far above me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I ain't never do you wrong, so tell me why you don't trust me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
She don't do this often, she said it's only because me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You the one who want it, therefore you can never judge me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
She just wanna party and nothing's wrong with that[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Every time I'm calling, she say she gon' call me back[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
I told her call me Rocky, she say she not gon' call me that[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You say you come with a lot, well, baby, I want all of that[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Lil' mama a party girl, she just wan' have fun too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you ain't wifey type, but I don't care, I want you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
She like to do drugs too, she in love with guns too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you too piped up, but I think that I love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Lil' mama a party girl, she just wan' have fun too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you ain't wifey type, but I don't care, I want you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
She like to do drugs too, she in love with guns too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
They say you too piped up, but I think that I love you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Don't be scared to party, don't be scared to party[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Don't be scared to party[/tab]
